997 int32_t con;

3352typedef struct InitInitServerPacket {

3359 uint8_t seq1;
3360 uint8_t seq2;

3362 uint8_t client_encryption_multiple;
3363 int32_t player_id;
3364 int32_t challenge_response;
3365 } ok;
3366 struct {
3367 InitBanType ban_type;
3368 union {
3369 struct {
3370 uint8_t minutes_remaining;
3371 } _0;
3372 struct {
3373 uint8_t minutes_remaining;
3374 } temporary;
3375 } *ban_type_data;
3376 } banned;
3377 struct {
3378 MapFile map_file;
3379 } warp_map;
3380 struct {
3381 MapFile map_file;
3382 } file_emf;
3383 struct {
3384 PubFile pub_file;
3385 } file_eif;
3386 struct {
3387 PubFile pub_file;
3388 } file_enf;
3389 struct {
3390 PubFile pub_file;
3391 } file_esf;
3392 struct {
3393 PubFile pub_file;
3394 } file_ecf;
3395 struct {
3396 MapFile map_file;
3397 } map_mutation;
3398 struct {
3399 PlayersList players_list;
3400 } players_list;
3401 struct {
3402 PlayersListFriends players_list;
3403 } players_list_friends;
3404 } *reply_code_data;
3405} InitInitServerPacket;

3585 char * guild_rank_name;

3591 int32_t usage;

3597 } select_character;

3599 char * news[9];
3600 Weight weight;
3601 size_t items_length;
3602 Item *items;
3603 size_t spells_length;
3604 Spell *spells;
3605 NearbyInfo nearby;
3606 } enter_game;
3607 } *welcome_code_data;
3608} WelcomeReplyServerPacket;
